creator: dburr@borg-cube.com
text:
The following ports, maintained by me, are either redundant or obsolete,
and should be removed.

databases/p5-ApacheDBI
	Redundant; we already have a ports/www/p5-Apache-DBI that is the same
	program.  I did not know this when commiting the port.  Oops. :(
audio/ripit-atapi
	The functionality of this port has been incorporated into
	ports/audio/ripit.  This port is no longer necessary.
audio/x11amp
	ports/audio/xmms contains the complete functionality of this port,
	and then some.  (plus it's open-source)

Fix: 

Nuke 'em!!! :)
